tagline: Expertise in High-Performance API Development, Database Optimization, and Scalability

projects.name: Building a Real-Time Streaming API with Apache Kafka and Spark
projects.description: Developed a real-time streaming API using Apache Kafka and Spark to process and analyze large datasets. Achieved a latency of 10ms and a throughput of 1000 requests per second.

projects.name: Optimizing Database Performance using Indexing and Query Tuning
projects.description: Optimized database performance by creating efficient indexes and tuning queries. Achieved a 50% reduction in query latency and a 20% increase in query throughput.

projects.name: Building a Data Pipeline with Spark and Hadoop
projects.description: Built a data pipeline using Spark and Hadoop to process and analyze large datasets. Achieved a data processing rate of 100 GB per hour and a data storage capacity of 1 TB.

layout_strategy: A clean and modern design with a clear color scheme and typography, using headings, subheadings, and bullet points to make it easy to navigate and understand.
template_dif: Use a 12-column grid system on desktop devices
Use a 6-column grid system on tablet devices
Use a single-column layout on mobile devices
Use Open Sans or Montserrat font for a clean and modern look
Use a purple accent color #7c3aed throughout the portfolio
